seoTitle: Pomona vs Ponto — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pomona and Ponto. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pomona and Ponto.
heading: Pomona vs Ponto — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pomona, New South Wales and Ponto, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ponto has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Pomona (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pomona or Ponto safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pomona has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Ponto scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pomona scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Ponto scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pomona or Ponto?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ponto has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
